id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

name.description: Human-readable stable name for the manifest or binding.

server_name.description: Logical MCP server name for metadata and policy binding.

transport.description: MCP transport metadata for adapters; conformance does not require a specific transport.

command.description: Optional command metadata for an MCP adapter; stdio execution is not required by the standard.

args.description: Optional process arguments for an adapter; they are not required by the standard.

env.description: Optional environment variable names or bindings for an adapter; secrets must not be embedded.

capabilities.description: Portable capability metadata advertised by the binding.

allowed_tools.description: Allowed tool names or identifiers exposed through this binding.

risk_level.description: Risk classification used for policy and review decisions.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this record in the portable OACS model.

namespace.description: Logical namespace used to separate records without requiring a specific storage backend.

scope.description: Portable scope labels that constrain where the record applies.

owner_actor_id.description: Optional actor identifier for ownership or accountability metadata.
